summary: User-context OAuth import, doctor readiness metadata, structured mutation dry-runs, metric availability, and discovery hints form a safer X control-plane contract.
reason: The X Content Engine needs to prove OAuth2 user-context auth, preview public and account mutations without side effects, and distinguish unavailable owned metrics before replacing xurl for live authenticated work.
validated_outcome: Focused tests cover OAuth2 import metadata, doctor user-context readiness, structured dry-run mutation previews, metric availability, and which/agent-context routing.
